prompt: Valida la comprensibilidad de la Unidad 1 de Lengua y Literatura 5to EGB (contenido proporcionado). Ejecuta los 3 perfiles de Student Simulator y genera el reporte completo.
expected_output: YAML comprehensibility report with global score, per-section scores for all 3 dimensions, per-profile scores, flagged fragments with severity and suggestions, and APROBADO/OBSERVACIONES/BLOQUEO decision.
expectations: Report includes all 3 profiles: AR, PR, NEE
Every section scored on legibilidad (0-100), carga_cognitiva (baja/media/alta), enganche (bajo/medio/alto)
Global score calculated from PR profile legibility scores
Decision field present with correct threshold application
Flagged fragments include section, paragraph number, problem description, severity, and concrete suggestion
YAML format follows the schema with all required fields

prompt: Valida este parrafo para 5to EGB: 'La fotosintesis, proceso bioquimico mediante el cual los organismos autotrofos sintetizan moleculas organicas complejas a partir de sustancias inorganicas simples utilizando la energia luminica captada por pigmentos clorofilicos, constituye la base fundamental de las cadenas troficas ecosistemicas.'
expected_output: Report flagging the paragraph as high severity for all profiles. Should score well below 80% for PR profile and trigger BLOQUEO decision with specific simplification suggestions.
expectations: Specific problems identified: sentence length, technical vocabulary without definition, high concept density
Concrete simplification suggestion provided (e.g., split sentence, define terms, reduce concepts per sentence)
NEE profile shows very low comprehensibility score

prompt: Valida la comprensibilidad de una unidad que solo tiene la seccion de apertura y desarrollo tema 1 (falta cierre y evaluacion).
expected_output: Report that validates available sections but flags missing sections as 'no evaluada'. Should warn that the global score is partial and cannot be used for Gate G2 advancement.
expectations: Available sections (apertura, desarrollo_tema1) are scored normally
Missing sections (cierre, evaluacion) marked as 'no evaluada'
Warning that global score is partial
Does not fabricate scores for missing sections
Recommends completing the unit before final validation
